_schema: DialogueProfile v3 — scripted nodes + LLM fallback. One file per NPC (id = NPCNode.dialogueId).

_modes.scripted: Triggered by firstMeetingOnly, flag condition, or probability roll. Lines display directly; DM is bypassed. Choices are shown as buttons.
_modes.llm: Fires when no trigger matches. DM generates freely using defaultContext + relationship history.

defaultContext: Speech style for LLM-mode dialogue: vocabulary, tone, speaking rhythm, topics this NPC will/won't discuss, typical reaction to repeat visitors. Do NOT describe personality (already in NPC publicDescription/secretLayers). Template variables like {user} are supported.

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: Narrator line — sets the scene before NPC speaks.

lines.speaker: npc
lines.text: NPC line — displayed with NPC name prefix.

lines.speaker: player
lines.text: Player action descriptor — shown as '> text'.

choices.text: What the player says or does (shown on button). Template variables supported.
choices._pre_conditions: All pre-conditions are evaluated BEFORE the choice is shown. Hidden if any fail.
choices.condition: flag_expression — choice hidden if false. Supports &, |, ! operators.
choices._post_condition_branching: Branches are evaluated AFTER effects are applied. First matching branch wins. Falls back to nextNodeId.
choices._transition_note: transitionLines: if set, these lines are shown instead of the target node's own lines. The target node's choices are still shown. Use for back/return navigation without repeating setup text.

transitionLines.speaker: npc
transitionLines.text: Short bridging line shown when returning to a previous node.

effects._knowledge: Grant intel to player. Each id is added to knownIntelIds AND sets flag know_<id> for use in conditions.
effects.grantQuest: quest_id — immediately grants the quest (player does not manually accept).

choices._note: Minimal choice — no conditions, no effects.

triggers._note: First meeting trigger — fires only on interactionCount === 0.
Conditional + probability trigger — evaluated in array order, first match wins.

_comment_contextSnippets: 條件式 context 片段（舊名 milestones，已更名）。當條件成立時注入 DM prompt。支援旗標表達式與 intel:<id> 語法。

contextSnippets.label: Design note: what this snippet represents (not injected into prompt).
contextSnippets.condition: flag_expression — snippet is active when true. Supports intel:<id> syntax.
contextSnippets.context: Injected into DM prompt for LLM-mode dialogue when active. Describe what the NPC knows/feels/plans.
